name: changedown
description: Durable change tracking with reasoning for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Track changes in Markdown through MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: ChangeDown brings track-changes workflows to Markdown and Word-backed review sessions. It gives Codex tools to read tracked files, propose changes, review changes, list threads, and work through durable CriticMarkup rather than raw edits.
defaultPrompt: Use ChangeDown to read and propose tracked Markdown edits.
Review proposed Markdown changes with ChangeDown.
